_comment: Tier-1 mcp_tool source presets for dockerhub-api (AU-KG.ingest.mcp-tool-connector). Syncs Docker Hub repositories into the KG as repository documents via the dockerhub-api MCP server hub_repos tool. Contributed presets win over the central MCP_TOOL_PRESETS. The native dockerhub_ingest_repositories tool + kg_ingest.py provide the typed :Repository/:ContainerImage graph nodes.
